deviations.what: the controller's onInit pre-sets the tokens on both MultiInputs (Token 1..6 and one long token); they are declared statically in the view's tokens aggregation instead - same rendering (CAPABILITIES.md marks controller-filled aggregations as expressible, the tokens aggregation is public since UI5 1.16), so this is a faithful 1:1, not a workaround.
the controller's addValidator (typing free text + Enter creates a token client-side) is dropped - abap2UI5 has no client-side validator hook.
the suggestion data is a 16-row subset of the mock /ProductCollection (ui5/mock/products.json).
The original's stray placeholder attributes on the two Labels (not a Label property) are dropped.
showClearIcon (since UI5 1.94) is newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.94 to render it.
